name: 儿童餐
size: 手持或桌面小道具尺寸
shooting_angle: 单物体居中，三分之二或正面产品摄影角度，完整可见

reference_prompt: A realistic children's meal prop in low-saturation colors matching real materials, consisting of a small burger, fries, and a drink in a colorful tray or box, handheld or desktop size, fixed visible position on table or beside character, no readable text, photorealistic style for short drama scene.。源记录硬约束：数量:1件；位置:首帧在角色手边或桌面固定位置；运动政策:保持固定或随角色手部轻微移动，不新增副本
